channel.title: XMonad on d3adb5's personal website
channel.description: Recent content in XMonad on d3adb5's personal website

item.title: Chronicles of XMonad and xmobar
item.description: This is a story about how the Haskell toolset, Arch Linux package maintainers, and font rendering engines made me lose a few hours of my life. Of course, I consider myself equally guilty, for my choices and stubbornness inevitably led to the happenings I am about to relay onto you. Chapter 1: First Mistakes It was a dark and stormy night somewhere in the world. I was sitting in front of my laptop, speaking to a couple of friends over Mumble, when I accidentally knocked over the glass of soda I’d just fetched from the kitchen.
